title: Interior, Closure, and Boundary of a Set in a Metric Space
description: A Venn diagram-like representation showing the relationship between a set A, its interior (A°), its closure (Ā), and its boundary (∂A) within a metric space X.
elements: An arbitrary subset A of X
relationships: A° is the largest open set contained within A
Ā is the smallest closed set that contains A
∂A is the set of points that are in the closure of A but not in the interior of A (∂A = Ā \ A°)
